sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40082" key="e)piloi/mia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλοίμια</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔπη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λοιμός</etym>) <sense id="n40082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incantations to drive away pestilence</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
